theme_analysis.summary: Summary: The majority of user feedback for the KYC theme is negative, with users expressing frustration and mistrust towards the company due to issues with account blocking, technical problems, and perceived unfair charges. Users have reported difficulties with the KYC process, app performance, and customer support, leading to a strong negative sentiment towards the platform. Recommendation: The product and engineering teams should prioritize streamlining the KYC process, improving app performance and stability, and enhancing customer support to address the significant user pain points and rebuild trust with the user base. Summary: The majority of user feedback for the KYC theme is negative, with users expressing frustration and mistrust towards the company due to issues with account blocking, technical problems, and perceived unfair charges. Users have reported difficulties with the KYC process, app performance, and customer support, leading to a strong negative sentiment towards the platform. Recommendation: The product and engineering teams should prioritize streamlining the KYC process, improving app performance and stability, and enhancing customer support to address the significant user pain points and rebuild trust with the user base.

theme_analysis.summary: Summary: The onboarding theme received mostly negative feedback, with users experiencing difficulties with login and password reset processes, as well as issues with trading and account management. Users are frustrated with the complexity and inefficiency of these processes, leading to a poor overall onboarding experience. Recommendation: The product team should prioritize simplifying and streamlining the login and password reset processes, such as introducing a phone number login option and improving the OTP delivery system, to reduce user friction and improve the overall onboarding experience. It's a very difficult app for an option trader while the limit orders execute in the market & GTT orders will execute far from the limit we set. SL is also the same, if we keep 10 points as SL it goes nearly 13 to 14 points & hits the SL. while coming to targets if we keep 20 points it will hit nearly 16 to 18 points. And the app does not provide any bracket orders, we can't set our targets & SL before the order activates, we only set the SL & Targets once the order activates.

In the latest version,the trading chart of groww application is useless not only that even the trading view chart is not working auto fib retrce isn't available if you try to use it manually then you can't set it up properly even if you try to remove fib indicator you can't ( and in old trading view chart you can split the screen in maximum 6 sections and can see 6 different stocks at a time)now can see only 1 chart for 1 stock that also malfunctioning it is really very poor form of groww app!!?

theme_analysis.summary: Summary: The "Other" theme receives overwhelmingly negative feedback, with users expressing frustration and disappointment with the platform's trading features, order execution, and technical charting tools. Users report issues with limit orders, stop-loss orders, and the lack of bracket orders, as well as problems with the trading chart and technical indicators. Recommendation: The product and engineering teams should prioritize enhancing the trading features and technical charting tools, including the implementation of bracket orders and improvement of order execution accuracy, to address the significant user pain points and improve the overall user experience. Summary: The "Other" theme receives overwhelmingly negative feedback, with users expressing frustration and disappointment with the platform's trading features, order execution, and technical charting tools. Users report issues with limit orders, stop-loss orders, and the lack of bracket orders, as well as problems with the trading chart and technical indicators. Recommendation: The product and engineering teams should prioritize enhancing the trading features and technical charting tools, including the implementation of bracket orders and improvement of order execution accuracy, to address the significant user pain points and improve the overall user experience.

quotes.text: iske mutual funds k paise apne aap kat jaate h. ya to ye ya fir inka staff krta hoga. par jhelna to hame h. mere kai saare Mutual funds k paise nikaala liya h. upar se nahi customer care se baat ho rhi or nahi complain pe kuch ho rha h. kindly resolve it & take strict action on it. otherwise no one will use this aap if you will cheat people. agar mere paise wapas ni hue to i will handover it to police. saare fraud hi h, customer support number pe call krne k baad OTP mangta h. How can I believe

Almost everyone think groww charges less brokerage,but guess what, it charges the highest brokerage - 0.2% of the whole transaction for MTF with no capping, so if suppose you have 1 lac ₹ and you get ×4 times MTF = 4 lac₹ equity trade , now if you exit in no profit no loss situation you exit for a price of 4 lac ₹ ,so they charge you for 8 lac₹ ( 4 exit 4 entry) =0.002×800000= 1600 Rs for a single trade and you were also paying interest of 14.95% pa of the complete amount. Crux- YOU LOOSE 2-3%

very slow process and disappointing process, I buyed a share for 281rs and I sell it for 295rs, the blockage charges for that share was 5rs, so I have the profit for 285, but there process was so slow it took more than a week. and because of there delay the market got crashed and the value of that share was low so I received the payment of 250. so it's not ok for big investors and traders, because if you know that the market is gonna crash tomorrow you can't make it in time to sell it.

theme_analysis.summary: Summary: Users have expressed significant dissatisfaction with the payment process on the Groww platform, citing issues with unexpected charges, high brokerage fees, and slow processing times that have resulted in financial losses. The negative feedback suggests a lack of transparency and efficiency in the payment system, leading to frustration and mistrust among users. Recommendation: The product and engineering teams should prioritize reviewing and optimizing the payment processing system to reduce delays, increase transparency around fees and charges, and provide more competitive brokerage rates to improve user trust and satisfaction. Summary: Users have expressed significant dissatisfaction with the payment process on the Groww platform, citing issues with unexpected charges, high brokerage fees, and slow processing times that have resulted in financial losses. I have been using the grow app for the last 3 years now I conclude this is very worst app. I have placed an order and it was successfully placed. after 2 hrs my account balance showed negative balance. and my trade was showing 1100 profit when trade went negative it is auto square off. when connect to support he said we due to holiday your profite amount and your real money was blocked due to this account balance is showing negative. and it will reflect today after EOD run. seriously.

If u have 1L capital and make 50K profit and withdraw 50K. Then your net tradable balance will be 1L. With withdrawalble balance 50K and Tradable (unsettled)50K. and if you incur loss of 90K and deposit the withdrawn balance again of 50K. Then your balance will be 60K. But to them that 50K is there father's property and they make people and SEBI fool, by using this scam and show there transaction history proof.Shameless scamsters. I've lodged complaint against u and next i am going to lodge FIR.

theme_analysis.summary: Summary: Users are experiencing issues with the accuracy and consistency of their account balance displays, resulting in frustration and mistrust, with many reporting glitches, incorrect balance updates, and discrepancies in their tradable and withdrawable balances. The majority of feedback is negative, with only a few neutral or positive comments, indicating a significant problem that needs to be addressed. Recommendation: The product/engineering team should prioritize fixing the balance display issues and implement a more transparent and accurate accounting system to reflect users' true balances, including unsettled trades and withdrawn funds, to restore user trust and confidence in the platform. Summary: Users are experiencing issues with the accuracy and consistency of their account balance displays, resulting in frustration and mistrust, with many reporting glitches, incorrect balance updates, and discrepancies in their tradable and withdrawable balances. The majority of feedback is negative, with only a few neutral or positive comments, indicating a significant problem that needs to be addressed. Recommendation: The product/engineering team should prioritize fixing the balance display issues and implement a more transparent and accurate accounting system to reflect users' true balances, including unsettled trades and withdrawn funds, to restore user trust and confidence in the platform.

I am very upset with customer support whose delay has resulted in financial loss to me. My Groww app hanged from 2.30pm onwards today while I was trying to redeem mutual funds. I tried relogging but it didn't help. I immediately called customer care but after 5-6 minutes the executive just stopped talking to me and transferred my call to IVR. I opened Customer Support chat at 2.46 pm but they could resolve my issue by 3.10pm by then I lost opportunity to get today's NAV for no fault of mine.
